target: 13. I'm Sorry
Aaaaaa!!!
Stop!!!
- Mio!!!

Tokiko… I'm sorry.

We're best friends…

M-Mio…
U-uhhh!!!

I-I should be the one to apologize!
I… I…

There's no way to take it back…
I've already…

Aaaaaa!!!

I'm sorry!!! 
I'm really sorry!!!
I want to go back to normal!
I want to be with everyone… with Mio again!

Ugh… ughh!!!
Aaaaaaaa!!!
Aaaaaa!!!

You guys…

Hey! Everyone!

…That's… that's…
No way…

You had no chance of winning,

Gh!!!

Shut up!!!
Stop.
My body… I can't move…?!

Be quiet.

Move!
Move!!!

Don't look at me like that.

N-No… I'm not…

Think about it.

You killed Mio-chan's older sister,
Ushio…

Ah… uh… ugh…

Yeah.

You!!!

Oops, you're full of energy.
Still want to fight?

Take this!!!
This…

Flame blast!
Burn to ashes!!!

Don't worry, Tokiko!
You'll be one of us!

Big brother…

What a beautiful sibling love.
Not bad, but…

Aaaaaa!!!
Big brother!!!
Sou!!!

Damn it!!!

Guh…
Shin-chan!!!
Like this, you see?

Shin-chan!!!
Wake up, Shin-chan!!!
Shin-chan!!!
(Still… not giving up)

(What can I do now?
I'm just… just going to give up)

Sou… and Shin-chan…
Ah, ahh!!!

Tokiko!
Ah, you did great!
Thanks to you, everything will wrap up nicely.

Ah… uh…
